title: AN ACT MAKING SURIGAO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, A PORT OF ENTRY, BY AMENDING THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 2056 / 65 OG No. 4, 772 (January 27, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4811*, January 27, 1969 ]

AN ACT MAKING SURIGAO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, A PORT OF ENTRY, BY AMENDING THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR
